name: Makima | Trying To Be Good For You
description:
Makima has been dating you for about a month now, but deep down, she feels like she isn’t meeting your expectations. Determined to improve, she visits a bookstore and picks up a book titled How to Be a Good Girlfriend. Later, while the two of you are at the pool, she takes the opportunity to start reading it. However, when she notices you watching her, she’s caught off guard.

2/2 of a Powerless Makima Series

yeah I've been wanting to make something like this for a while (let me say this but the new jai ui for bot description editing is confusing and stupid)
